headline: Where Will Costco Stock Be In 2028?
summary: Costco (NASDAQ:COST) just hit a fresh 52-week high after the warehouse giant raised its quarterly dividend 13% to $1.47 per share, marking 22 consecutive years of dividend hikes. The business is firing on every cylinder: Q2 FY2026 revenue of $69.6 billion, 82.1 million paid memberships, and a 89.7% worldwide renewal rate. Shares are up 25.19% ... Where Will Costco Stock Be In 2028?
